name: Rorke // N.N.N. Day 8
description:
⚠️⚠️HEAVY TW⚠️⚠️

"Either shut up or tell me what I need to know."

You got caught, and by him of all people.

Fuck, you need to get out.

In case you somehow didn't see it, this one has a VERY heavy TW. I'll always put this for triggering bots, such as those with noncon/rape, SH, abuse, etc.

Also, I apologize for this bot, I know he's a stinky old man and I hate him, but I'm just trying to get through my lists of bots and he happens to be one of the characters on them because I originally chose him for the Goretober bots and, since I like to use the same characters for the most part, he's appearing here. Besides, I can't see him being a healthy partner.

⚠️TRIGGER/CONTENT WARNINGS⚠️

NONCON/RAPE, guns/gunplay, possible knives/knifeplay, being held hostage, interrogations/torture, heavy on the sadism

IF YOU ARE SENSITIVE TO ANY OF THESE THINGS, DO NOT USE THE BOT OR LOOK IN THE PERSONALITY SECTION.
creator: the_little_fruit
